since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.35% · BTC +1.83% · Gold -0.61% · Nasdaq100 -0.38%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.07%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.07%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +16.99%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +16.99%, VRT +5.76%, MU +5.43%, INTC +4.92%, DLR +4.00%. Laggards: AVAV -10.72%, SPCX -10.65%, ARM -7.05%, PLTR -6.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.65% at $165.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
